content:
🔥 openlitespeed | C++
🎯 Primary Use Case: Serving web content efficiently and at high speeds.
✨ Key Features: • High-performance HTTP server • Lightweight • Open source • GPLv3 license • Developed by LiteSpeed Technologies
📖 Summary: OpenLiteSpeed is a high-performance, lightweight, open-source HTTP server developed by LiteSpeed Technologies. It is distributed under the GPLv3 license and offers robust web serving capabilities with a focus on speed and efficiency.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
